user_query: I am a EuroMillions enthusiast and I am interested in exploring the history of the lottery. Can you provide me with the past EuroMillions draw results? Additionally, I would like to gather news articles about EuroMillions winners and their life-changing experiences. Your assistance would be greatly appreciated.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the past EuroMillions draw results including dates and winning numbers.
Conduct a search for news articles featuring EuroMillions winners and their life-changing experiences.
